title: At the Pharmacy

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ، أَحْتَاجُ إِلَى دَوَاءٍ لِأَلَمِ الْحَلْقِ.
lines.bs: Selam alejkum, trebam lijek za bolove u grlu.
lines.en: Peace be upon you, I need medicine for a sore throat.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: وَعَلَيْكُمُ السَّلَامُ! أَهْلًا بِكَ. مُنْذُ مَتَى تُعَانِي مِنْ أَلَمِ الْحَلْقِ؟
lines.bs: Ve alejkum selam! Dobrodošli. Koliko dugo imate bolove u grlu?
lines.en: And peace be upon you! Welcome. Since when have you been suffering from a sore throat?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: مُنْذُ يَوْمَيْنِ. الأَلَمُ شَدِيدٌ خَاصَّةً عِنْدَ الْبَلْعِ.
lines.bs: Već dva dana. Bol je jaka posebno pri gutanju.
lines.en: For two days. The pain is intense especially when swallowing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: هَلْ عِنْدَكَ أَعْرَاضٌ أُخْرَى مِثْلُ الْحُمَّى أَوِ السُّعَالِ؟
lines.bs: Imate li i druge simptome poput temperature ili kašlja?
lines.en: Do you have any other symptoms such as fever or cough?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، عِنْدِي سُعَالٌ بَسِيطٌ وَأَشْعُرُ بِتَعَبٍ عَامٍّ.
lines.bs: Da, imam blag kašalj i osjećam se opšte umorno.
lines.en: Yes, I have a mild cough and I feel generally tired.

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: يَبْدُو أَنَّكَ مُصَابٌ بِنَزْلَةِ بَرْدٍ. هَلْ مَعَكَ وَصْفَةٌ طِبِّيَّةٌ؟
lines.bs: Čini se da ste prehladni. Imate li ljekarsku receptu?
lines.en: It seems you have a cold. Do you have a medical prescription?

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: لَا، لَيْسَ مَعِي وَصْفَةٌ. هَلْ يُمْكِنُنِي شِرَاءُ الدَّوَاءِ بِدُونِ وَصْفَةٍ؟
lines.bs: Ne, nemam receptu. Mogu li kupiti lijek bez recepta?
lines.en: No, I do not have a prescription. Can I buy medicine without a prescription?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: نَعَمْ، لِنَزْلَةِ الْبَرْدِ الْعَادِيَّةِ لَا تَحْتَاجُ إِلَى وَصْفَةٍ. سَأُعْطِيكَ أَقْرَاصًا لِلْحَلْقِ وَشَرَابًا لِلسُّعَالِ.
lines.bs: Da, za obićnu prehladu ne trebate receptu. Dat ću vam tablete za grlo i sirup za kašalj.
lines.en: Yes, for a regular cold you do not need a prescription. I will give you throat tablets and cough syrup.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: كَيْفَ آخُذُ الدَّوَاءَ؟ مَا الْجُرْعَةُ الصَّحِيحَةُ؟
lines.bs: Kako uzimam lijek? Koja je ispravna doza?
lines.en: How do I take the medicine? What is the correct dosage?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: خُذْ قُرْصًا وَاحِدًا مِنْ أَقْرَاصِ الْحَلْقِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ يَوْمِيًّا. وَالشَّرَابُ مَلْعَقَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ مَرَّتَيْنِ.
lines.bs: Uzimajte jednu tabletu za grlo tri puta dnevno. A sirupa jednu žlicu dva puta.
lines.en: Take one throat tablet three times daily. And one large spoonful of syrup twice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.arabic: شُكْرًا. وَهَلْ هُنَاكَ أَيُّ تَحْذِيرَاتٍ يَجِبُ أَنْ أَعْرِفَهَا؟
lines.bs: Hvala. Ima li ikakvih upozorenja koja trebam znati?
lines.en: Thank you. Are there any warnings I should know about?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: لَا تَأْخُذِ الدَّوَاءَ عَلَى مَعِدَةٍ فَارِغَةٍ. وَاشْرَبْ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْمَاءِ الدَّافِئِ.
lines.bs: Ne uzimajte lijek na prazan stomak. I pijte puno tople vode.
lines.en: Do not take the medicine on an empty stomach. And drink plenty of warm water.

lines.speaker: A
lines.bs: Koliko košta lijek? Je li cijena razumna?
lines.en: How much does the medicine cost? Is the price reasonable?

lines.speaker: B
lines.arabic: الأَقْرَاصُ بِخَمْسَةِ دَنَانِيرَ وَالشَّرَابُ بِثَمَانِيَةٍ. الْمَجْمُوعُ ثَلَاثَةَ عَشَرَ دِينَارًا. أَتَمَنَّى لَكَ الشِّفَاءَ!
lines.bs: Tablete su pet dinara a sirup osam. Ukupno trinaest dinara. Želim vam zdravlje!
lines.en: The tablets are five dinars and the syrup is eight. Total thirteen dinars. I wish you recovery!

grammarFocus: مُنْذُ for duration and imperative verb forms for instructions
